title: crolocos aurea
side_effects: Crolocos aurea can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and gastrointestinal issues. Overconsumption of the plant's extract has been linked to symptoms like dizziness, nausea, and stomach pain. Prolonged use of crolocos aurea without proper medical guidance can also cause liver damage and interact with certain medications, leading to severe health complications. Additionally, improper preparation of the plant can result in the presence of toxic compounds, further exacerbating its potential side effects.
